title: Procurator-class Star Battlecruiser

The '''''Procurator''-class Star Battlecruiser''', also known as the '''''Procurator''-class battle cruiser''' or the '''''Procurator''-class warship''', was a 2,500-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Warship/Legends|warship]] first produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] two centuries before the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The first [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to qualify as a [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] under the [[Anaxes War College System/Legends|Anaxes War College System]], the ''Procurator''-class was heavily-armed and featured a ventral protrusion to accommodate its powerful reactor. The ''Procurator''-class was refined over the years before it was succeeded by the four thousand-meter-long [[Praetor-class Star Battlecruiser/Legends|''Praetor''-class Star Battlecruiser]] and the eight thousand meter-long [[Mandator-class Star Dreadnaught|''Mandator''-class Star Dreadnaught]]. ''Procurator''-class Star Battlecruisers were primarily used to defend the [[Kuat sector/Legends|Kuat sector]], though they also served to attract wealthy clients to KDY.<ref name="Warfare" />
